title: choice (2)
body:
- ))}}
    - you wanna do something productive
take something reductive
apply means of inductive reasoning
define meaning you can fuck with
and good luck with that
there's no instruction book to misread
just us and a billion pieces that never fit our thesis
completely fabricated stories sang in voices we name our noises
my advice is don't fight it
this is blood sport performed for us by us
so i  kick it with force whatever shape my i is
i risk everything cuz that's what life is
open to anything cuz that's the cost of tryin
but imagine we win
the world that we're in
we can see it coming
so we play the games we think we find in front us
we can feel the power pulsing through our bodies
the energy hummin
but in the end we're only human
so our demons always confront us
demanding sacrifice because they don't know what love is
i want you to build something
i can't wait to touch it
reel recognize reel cuz when
we pull the curtain back ourselves what we reveal to the public
is choice
